init_hook: FASTAPTAMER_COMMIT=c49965dc087c0e7a1b629e4e4df99259772d4b22; STARCODE_COMMIT=8987b2eb7558bdb6e8a44823881e4e2f76f47535; CPANM_URL=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/miyagawa/cpanminus/1.7048/cpanm; CPANM_SHA256=4c5dcaac65e0c3e6e4272fd0f5c0a9c9ebdcbb29cdf329b18478b52f6883071c; mkdir -p "$PWD/.devbox/tools" && { [ -d "$PWD/.devbox/tools/FASTAptamer/.git" ] || git clone https://github.com/FASTAptamer/FASTAptamer.git "$PWD/.devbox/tools/FASTAptamer"; } && (cd "$PWD/.devbox/tools/FASTAptamer" && git fetch --quiet && git checkout --quiet "$FASTAPTAMER_COMMIT" && chmod +x fastaptamer_*) && { [ -d "$PWD/.devbox/tools/starcode/.git" ] || git clone https://github.com/gui11aume/starcode.git "$PWD/.devbox/tools/starcode"; } && (cd "$PWD/.devbox/tools/starcode" && git fetch --quiet && git checkout --quiet "$STARCODE_COMMIT" && { [ -x ./starcode ] || make CC=clang; }) && { [ -x "$PWD/.devbox/tools/cpanm" ] || (curl -fsSL "$CPANM_URL" -o "$PWD/.devbox/tools/cpanm.tmp" && echo "$CPANM_SHA256  $PWD/.devbox/tools/cpanm.tmp" | shasum -a 256 -c - && chmod +x "$PWD/.devbox/tools/cpanm.tmp" && mv "$PWD/.devbox/tools/cpanm.tmp" "$PWD/.devbox/tools/cpanm"); } && { [ -d "$PWD/local/lib/perl5" ] || perl "$PWD/.devbox/tools/cpanm" --notest --quiet --local-lib-contained="$PWD/local" --installdeps .; }
